description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a long, rectangular slide and a robust, angular frame. The grip is steeply raked and features a textured pattern for improved handling, with visible finger grooves and a squared-off base. The trigger guard is thick and slightly squared, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly accommodating gloved use. The barrel is extended, protruding beyond the slide, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. The surface is uniformly matte gray, suggesting a metal construction with a non-reflective finish. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present on the slide or frame.
description: A matte gray, semi-automatic handgun with a long slide, textured grip, and extended barrel. The design is angular and utilitarian, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the slide, extended barrel, and the detailed grip with finger grooves.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, squared trigger guard, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide, grip texture, and the angular frame contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, the magazine base, and the alignment of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular with a steep rake and features a textured surface pattern, likely stippled or checkered, for enhanced traction. It has pronounced finger grooves for ergonomic comfort and a squared-off base that may aid in magazine changes. The material appears to be polymer, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and slightly squared, providing a robust and protective enclosure for the trigger. It is generously sized, possibly to accommodate gloved fingers, and lacks any undercuts or integrated accessories. The surface appears smooth with no additional texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and extends beyond the slide, with a straight, unadorned profile. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte gray of the rest of the handgun. No external markings or fluting are present.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is squared-off and flat, with no visible extensions, flaring, or finger rests. The design is simple and functional, lacking any logos, texturing, or decorative features.
